query: SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as total_vendas, COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_metas FROM companies c LEFT JOIN sales s ON c.id = s.companyId LEFT JOIN goals g ON c.id = g.companyId GROUP BY c.id, c.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as total_vendas, COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_metas FROM companies c LEFT JOIN sales s ON c.id = s.companyId LEFT JOIN goals g ON c.id = g.companyId GROUP BY c.id, c.name;
